hint.en:
MODE-AWARE. Fires when the room temperature has hit or passed the setpoint, within [tolerance]°C margin.

• In HEATING mode: fires when the room has warmed up to at least (setpoint − tolerance).
• In COOLING mode: fires when the room has cooled down to at most (setpoint + tolerance).
• In AUTO / OFF: does NOT fire (unclear which direction is 'reached').

Typical use: trigger 'Turn boost off' once the target is reached, regardless of season. Set tolerance to 0 for exact match, or e.g. 0.2°C to end boost slightly before hitting setpoint.
hint.nl: MODUS-AFHANKELIJK. Activeert wanneer de kamertemperatuur het setpoint heeft bereikt of gepasseerd, binnen [tolerance]°C marge.
